description: Seed list: passports × destinations the agent will verify. Extend anytime — the agent skips entries already verified within TTL.
notes: A passport + destination that are identical (e.g. India → India) is auto-skipped.
The agent calls Claude with web_search enabled and requires a gov-domain source URL to mark an entry 'verified'.
Entries without an authoritative source are marked 'unknown' and not shown on-site.
